name: claude-opus-4-5-migration
tagline: Migrates Claude model strings and prompt phrasing in a codebase from Sonnet 4.0/4.5 or Opus 4.1 to Opus 4.5.
verdict: Clear, deterministic model-string migration table with good context economy (bulky snippets split into reference files). But the effort-parameter step contradicts its own reference note (always-add vs. only-if-requested), failure paths go unaddressed, and there's no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: Step 4 says always 'Add effort parameter set to high' during migration, but Reference section says use effort.md 'only if user requests it' — contradicts.
Deliverable is only 'Summarize all changes made' — no defined format, location, or required sections for the summary.
No failure-path guidance anywhere (no model strings found, ambiguous platform, header already absent) across the multi-step flow.
